appDesc.message: Spots when you're viewing a product and reminds you that you might not need it. Syncs your list across browsers.

unkMsg.message: You're looking at a product you haven't flagged yet. Take a second before buying.

blockTitle.message: You already said you DON'T need it

blockMsg.message: You marked this exact product as unnecessary. Did anything really change?

familyTitle.message: Looks like something you already passed on

familyMsg.message: Not identical, but very similar to a product you marked as unnecessary.

reminderBar.message: Remember you said you didn't need it.

coveredMsg.message: The page stays blurred. If you really need it, tap “Show anyway”.

cartMsg.message: You're in the cart with $1. Do you really need it all before paying?

cartFlagged.message: You'd already said you DON'T need:

optIntro.message: Manage the products you flagged. They sync with your account.

dismissedHint.message: Don't Buy runs on any site where it detects products. You disabled these: it won't run there. Re-enable to use it again.

blockEmpty.message: You haven't marked anything as unnecessary yet.

confirmClear.message: Clear your list of products you don't need?
